title: New Sounds - Ars Nouveau Spells
description: Redesign of Ars Nouveau spell book sound effects
body:
### Archived

I don't really have interest in updating the pack, I only made it as a portfolio piece. It should work on all future versions of Ars Nouveau and the sounds are free to use non-commercially with attribution.

--- ## Redesign of Ars Nouveau spell book sound effects
